prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document specifically discusses the stock and rents of private registered providers of social housing, highlighting data collected in England. It makes clear references to the regulatory framework and data collection processes that apply exclusively to England, indicating that its content and applicability are limited to this nation.
